name: Gruggar Grimshackle
sd_appearance: A towering orc, his deep green skin scarred and weathered, strides through the labyrinthine Undercity. His tusks gleam ominously as he moves, a hulking figure clad in a tattered leather coat. His eyes, sharp and cunning, are hidden beneath a low-brimmed, battered hat. A double-headed axe hangs from his belt, while a worn crossbow rests on his back. Among the eclectic mix of faction denizens, Gruggar stands out with his distinctive personal item: a large, ornate silver skull hanging around his neck, a grim reminder of his ruthless ambition.
faction_visual: eclectic mix, deliberately no faction marks, one defining personal item
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
